name: Philly-Style White Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf frozen white bread dough, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté vegetables (onion and green pepper) in 1 tablespoon olive oil until they become limp. Add roast beef to the skillet.
2. Continue cooking for three more minutes. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and black pepper. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, then remove from heat. Set aside.
3. Dust a work surface with flour and roll out the thawed bread dough to fit a 10-inch x 15-inch baking sheet. Place the dough into the pan, creating a rim of dough around the edges.
4. Brush the remaining olive oil over the dough and spread the crushed garlic evenly across the surface.
5. Spread a thin layer of shredded cheese over the dough, followed by the meat/vegetable mixture, ensuring even distribution.
6. Add another layer of shredded cheese and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly. Allow to rest for 5 minutes before cutting and serving.
